query:
-- Compute groupTotalCost for ALL revenue groups
UPDATE revenue_groups rg
JOIN (
  SELECT revenueGroupId, SUM(monthlyCost) AS grpCost
  FROM services
  WHERE revenueGroupId IS NOT NULL AND revenueGroupId != ''
  GROUP BY revenueGroupId
) costs ON rg.groupId = costs.revenueGroupId
SET rg.totalCost = costs.grpCost;

-- Verify final state
SELECT
  rg.type,
  COUNT(*) AS groupCount,
  SUM(rg.totalRevenue) AS totalRev,
  SUM(rg.totalCost) AS totalCost,
  SUM(CASE WHEN rg.totalCost > rg.totalRevenue THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS lossGroups
FROM revenue_groups rg
GROUP BY rg.type;
